bookDesc: Learn HTML from scratch, including elements, forms, tables, semantic tags, multimedia, and best practices for building web pages.
Master CSS with colors, typography, Flexbox, Grid, animations, transitions, and responsive web design techniques.
Understand JavaScript fundamentals including variables, functions, arrays, objects, DOM manipulation, events, promises, and APIs.
Learn how to build fast and scalable server-side applications using Node.js, Express, file system, HTTP modules, and REST APIs.
Create modern single-page applications using React, components, props, state, hooks, routing, and API integration.
Learn SQL queries, joins, indexes, normalization, transactions, stored procedures, and efficient database design.
